title: helenium radiatum
intro: Helenium radiatum, commonly known as Rocky Mountain Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helenium radiatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of allergies, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to soothe skin irritations, calm coughs, and promote overall well-being.
